title: Entity-ID translation API routes mounted without authentication
description: A set of internal identifier-translation routes under /api/eid-translation, intended only for authenticated frontend use, shipped without the +auth middleware applied to the rest of the API. In src/metabase/api_routes/routes.clj the /eid-translation prefix was mounted as the bare namespace ('metabase.eid-translation.api) rather than wrapped in (+auth ...), so the endpoints were reachable without a session. This allowed anonymous callers to translate any opaque public-looking entity identifier they supplied into its internal numeric ID, enabling unauthenticated enumeration and reconnaissance against an exposed instance (identifier metadata only; no row-level content).
